metadata.description: Wire format for `vibe registry publish --json`. Source of truth for `crates/vibe-wire/src/generated/registry_publish_report.rs`.
Human-readable host name from the `RepoCreator` adapter — e.g. `"gitverse.ru"`.
Organization-root URL the package was published under, as recorded in `vibe.toml`'s `[[registry]].url`.
Repository name under the org, derived from the registry's `naming` convention. For default `kind-name` naming this is `<kind>-<name>`.
Clone URL of the per-package repository — what consumers' lockfile `source_url` would record.
The tag pushed for this release — typically `v<semver>`.
True iff this run created the repository (it didn't exist before). False iff the repo was reused — typical when re-publishing additional versions.
True iff `--dry-run` was passed. When true, no API calls or pushes were made; the report describes the planned action.
